what_was_done: Session 645: (1) Added startup retry with backoff to toolshed.py (commit 7b1e59b). (2) Built toolshed_bridge.py — stdio-to-HTTP bridge that Claude Code spawns directly, with auto-reconnect. Fixes mid-session MCP drops (CC bug #31198). Updated mcp.json to use bridge.

Gate 2: Unicode non-breaking space bypasses rm -rf regex (MEDIUM)
Gate 17: plaintext injection phrases not scanned on PreToolUse (MEDIUM)
2 pre-existing test failures in toolshed: TestStdioBackend (test_spawn, test_cleanup)
